schemes.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
schemes.description: Direct income support to farmer families
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year (₹2,000 every 4 months) direct to bank account
schemes.applyProcess: Register at PM-KISAN portal or Common Service Center (CSC)

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)

requirements: Have land lease certificate or deed

schemes.benefits: Insurance coverage up to 150% of crop value, premium ~1.5-5% of sum insured
schemes.applyProcess: Register with nearest bank or insurance agent before sowing

schemes.name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
schemes.benefits: Subsidy: 40-80% on machinery (tractors, harvesters, pumps, dryers, etc.)

schemes.name: NABARD Schemes
schemes.description: Agricultural loans at low interest rates
schemes.benefits: Short-term/medium-term loans at 4-7% interest, govt subsidy on interest
schemes.applyProcess: Approach NABARD-affiliated bank with land documents

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.benefits: Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh, low interest (4-7%), insurance on default
schemes.applyProcess: Apply at your primary bank with land documents

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Free soil testing and nutrient management
schemes.benefits: Free soil testing, health card with nutrient recommendations, personalized fertilizer advice
schemes.applyProcess: Register at soil health portal or visit nearest soil testing lab

schemes.name: Zero Budget Natural Farming
schemes.benefits: ₹10,000-50,000 subsidy depending on crop & duration, free training

schemes.name: Mission Green Farming
schemes.description: Green manuring and sustainable farming subsidies
schemes.benefits: ₹1,000-5,000 per hectare subsidy on green seeds and training

schemes.name: Dairy Enterprise Scheme
schemes.benefits: ₹15,000-50,000 subsidy on dairy equipment, feed subsidies
schemes.applyProcess: Apply through District Dairy Development Officer

schemes.name: Poly House & Greenhouse Farming
schemes.benefits: 30-50% subsidy on poly house construction (up to ₹10 lakh), drip irrigation

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
schemes.benefits: Subsidy on drip irrigation (40-60%), sprinkler systems, wells, check dams

schemes.name: Agricultural Storage Scheme
schemes.benefits: 50% subsidy on storage facility (up to ₹1 lakh per unit)

schemes.name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
schemes.description: Digital platform for direct crop sales
schemes.benefits: Direct access to buyers, no commission to middlemen, transparent pricing
schemes.applyProcess: Register at e-NAM portal with APMC membership

schemes.name: Agricultural Technology Management Agency (ATMA)

requirements: Willing to learn new farming techniques

schemes.benefits: Free training on crop varieties, pest management, organic farming, soil health
schemes.applyProcess: Visit nearest ATMA office or block agriculture center

schemes.name: Women Farmer Schemes
schemes.benefits: Extra subsidy on machinery (15-20%), priority in loans, skill training
schemes.applyProcess: Apply with land title & Aadhaar at district office

schemes.name: Organic Farming Certification
schemes.benefits: 25-50% subsidy on certification (up to ₹10,000), premium price for organic crops

schemes.name: Agricultural Export Policy
schemes.benefits: Export subsidies, logistics support, quality certification help, market access
